{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321131031F159163FFD3889B01F89\"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353415537777476388","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的故事真是精彩！每个悬疑案件都让我屏息凝神，仿佛自己也置身于那个迷雾重重的民国时代，和鹿鸣他们一起寻找真相。而且书中对四合院的描写也很细致，让我对老北京城的建筑有了更深入的了解。想起小时候住在四合院里的经历，还真是让人怀念啊！这本书真不错，推荐给你！","text_exts":[{"e":65,"s":62,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406983189B01F89%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227353415537777476388%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227145766425896946702%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710014299,"group_id":"7145766425896946702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyCMGobYzvoB3lDpCroQz7dAjMkvf77esROmaBo81hxQ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1401250630343754","user_name":"新胡安岛的慕容"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1401250630343754","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7145766425896946702","book_info":{"abstract":"小说讲述了十个悬疑故事，一组探案组合带你领略扑朔迷离的民国悬疑案，看年轻的苏格兰场探长鹿鸣，小助手宣仪安，女记者千里寻真，在迷雾重重
